# Week 02: Understanding Landsat 8

To access Landsat 8 presentation, click on the following link: [Landsat 8 Presentation](https://beatriz-werneck.github.io/presentation_landsat_8/#8)

```{r}
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(url = "https://beatriz-werneck.github.io/presentation_landsat_8/",
                              ratio = "16:9")
```
